name: Boost Run Inc.
business: Boost Run Holdings provides high-performance GPU servers for AI and HPC workloads via rental agreements. It serves customers through its direct platform, third-party AI platforms, and GPU brokers. Its compute offerings are generally more affordable than major cloud providers.

exposures.sentence: Boost Run Holdings owns, leases, and operates bare metal GPUs servers housed within top-tier certified data centers.
Component supply constraints, power availability, and changes in data-center energy regulation could influence Boost Run Holdings ability to scale operations or maintain current pricing levels.
Component supply constraints, power availability, and changes in data-center energy regulation could influence Boost Run Holdings ability to scale operations or maintain current pricing levels.

tamClaims.claim: The AI market expanded from $391 billion in 2025 to a projected $1.81 trillion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate of 27.67%.
tamClaims.sentence: The AI market expanded from $391 billion in 2025 to a projected $1.81 trillion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate of 27.67%.

tamClaims.claim: Enterprise adoption accelerated from 55% of organizations utilizing AI in 2023 to 78% in 2024.
tamClaims.sentence: Enterprise adoption accelerated from 55% of organizations utilizing AI in 2023 to 78% in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Technology companies have announced capital expenditures exceeding $80 billion annually for AI infrastructure, with 70% allocated to AI servers.
tamClaims.sentence: Technology companies have announced capital expenditures exceeding $80 billion annually for AI infrastructure, with 70% allocated to AI servers.
